name: The Ultimate Trivia Challenge
short_description: How well do you know your trivia? Choose from 9 popular categories and challenge friends and family in Party Mode (up to 4 players).
detailed_description:
RECENT UPDATES

- v1.1 Fixed grammatical and factual errors. Thank you for all your feedback Steam Community!


About the Game

HOW WELL DO YOU KNOW YOUR TRIVIA?

Test your knowledge in The Ultimate Trivia Challenge.

Trivia has never been so much fun. Challenge yourself in Single Player, or host a trivia night with friends and family in Party Mode (up to 4 players). Choose a category and answer thousands of multiple-choice questions. Want an extra twist? Spin the Wheel Challenge—or take a break and test your ears with Name That Sound!

Includes 9 fan-favorite categories:

  • Movies

  • Music

  • Sports

  • People & Places

  • General Knowledge

  • History

  • Science

  • Spelling

  • Famous Quotes

Features

  • Single Player Mode

  • Party Mode (Up to 4 Players)

  • Thousands of multiple-choice questions

  • Perfect for group trivia nights

  • Quick, pick-up-and-play sessions

  • Family-friendly fun for all ages

  • Gamepad support

So what are you waiting for? Download now and get your brain ready for The Ultimate Trivia Challenge!
